settings.title: Real Ingredients
settings.description: We believe the best cocktails start with the best ingredients. Every Barcoop Bevy mixer is crafted with all-natural, premium ingredients — no artificial flavors, colors, or preservatives.

settings.title: Made by Real Bartenders
settings.description: Our recipes are developed by experienced bartenders who know what makes a great cocktail. Each mixer is balanced and refined to deliver bar-quality drinks at home.

settings.title: Easy to Use
settings.description: Just add your spirit of choice, pour over ice, and enjoy. It's that simple. No measuring, no muddling, no mess.

settings.heading: About Barcoop Bevy
settings.subheading: All-natural cocktail mixers made by real bartenders in Charleston, South Carolina.
